project.name: RAGFlow
project.stack: Flask backend, React/TypeScript frontend (UmiJS, Ant Design), Docker Compose, MySQL, Elasticsearch/Infinity, Redis, MinIO; iOS: SwiftUI, GRDB, EPUBKit, PDFKit, Accelerate

completed: Phase 1 complete: P1.1 Brave Search, P1.2 Additional Tools, P1.3 sys.query fix, P1.4 Docker stability, P1.5 Document processing, P1.6 Test coverage
Phase 2 fully scaffolded and building: NavigationSplitView, search, streaming, citations
P2 high-value features implemented and tested end-to-end
P2.5 Brave Search wiring complete (commit bb4f98f97)
Universal layout: iPhone TabView + iPad NavigationSplitView (commit 0d71a81ef)
iOS live testing prep — all 4 phases complete:
Phase 1 DONE: ATS plist keys, AppIcon asset catalog (1024x1024 generated), PBXResourcesBuildPhase wired
Phase 2 DONE: API key guard (Claude + Ollama), provider banner in ChatView, Settings always accessible iPad, debug reset helpers
Phase 3 DONE: DB migration v4 (messages + message_sources), ChatViewModel load/save/delete persistence, multi-KB scoped by primary kbId
P4.1 — ingestPDF + ingestEPUB run parse+chunk in Task.detached(priority:.utility); nonisolated stripHTMLStatic
P4.2 — LibraryViewModel.hasScannedDocumentsFolder static flag; scanDocumentsFolder runs once per app session
P4.3 — RAGService.ingestPhase @Published string surfaces step labels in LibraryView overlay
Simulator smoke test PASSED: onboarding, KB list, app icon on home screen all verified
next_steps: P5.1 — DOCX via ZipFoundation (unzip → word/document.xml → strip XML)
P5.2 — XLSX via ZipFoundation (xl/sharedStrings.xml + sheet1.xml → TSV)
P5.3 — PPTX via ZipFoundation (ppt/slides/*.xml → strip XML)
P5.4 — EML basic MIME parsing (no library needed)
P6.1 — Fresh install wipe test end-to-end on real device
P6.2 — Replace silent try? with proper error propagation; fix try! migrate() crash risk
P1.3 — Set DEVELOPMENT_TEAM in Xcode Signing & Capabilities for real-device deployment

phase_status.iOS_live_testing_phase1: COMPLETE — ATS plist, AppIcon asset catalog, PBXResourcesBuildPhase
phase_status.iOS_live_testing_phase2: COMPLETE — API guards, provider banner, Settings accessible, debug helpers
phase_status.iOS_live_testing_phase3: COMPLETE — chat history persisted to SQLite (messages + message_sources)
phase_status.iOS_live_testing_phase4: COMPLETE — ingest off main thread, scan-once guard, phase progress labels
phase_status.iOS_live_testing_phase6: PENDING — hardening, version bump, TestFlight prep

known_gaps.code_signing: DEVELOPMENT_TEAM not set — user must configure in Xcode for real device
known_gaps.try_bang_migrate: DatabaseService.init uses try! migrate() — crashes on migration failure
